# Reports

This directory holds **output artefacts** generated by the training and
evaluation notebooks.  Nothing is committed here by default — all files are
produced locally when you run the notebooks.

## Generated files

| File | Produced by | Contents |
|------|-------------|----------|
| `training_curves.png` | `02_modeling.ipynb` | Loss and accuracy curves for every training run. |
| `optuna_best_params.json` | `02_modeling.ipynb` | Best hyperparameters found by the Optuna study. |
| `evaluation_metrics.json` | `03_evaluation.ipynb` | Test-set metrics + per-class classification report. |
| `confusion_matrix.npy` | `03_evaluation.ipynb` | 102×102 confusion matrix for the final model. |

## Reporting results

No metrics are committed to this repository. To document performance:

1. Run `02_modeling.ipynb` and then `03_evaluation.ipynb` on a GPU runtime.
2. Read the measured numbers from `evaluation_metrics.json`.
3. Fill in the results table in the top-level `README.md`.

This keeps every reported number traceable to an actual training run.
